description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a slotted flash hider at the muzzle. The receiver is robust and boxy, with a visible charging handle and selector switch on the side. The handguard and stock are both finished in a reddish-brown wood texture, contrasting with the matte black metal components. The magazine is also curved and appears to be made of metal or polymer, matching the utilitarian design. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, typical of military-style rifles used in urban environments.
description: A military-style assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and barrel with front sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, handguard, magazine, and barrel, mirroring the first side but with different lighting.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
